abilities.name: Pneumatic Tracker
abilities.description: May substitute Pneumatic Skill for Cunning when using Notice and Track.

abilities.name: Prey on the Unaware
abilities.description: Attack flips gain + against characters that haven't taken a turn in Dramatic Time.

actions: (1) Steel Claws (Pneumatic) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/5 damage. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram. Mask Leap: Target Drop Prone.
(1) Chain Harpoon (Pneumatic) | AV: 5R (11R) | Rg: z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 and Slow. Ram Pull and Drag: Push 3 yards toward you.
system.notes: Construct designed to track escaped convicts. Segmented body, specially sprung legs, chain harpoon.
